title: Sialkal Range Development Council (SRDC) Meeting Nei
content:
589/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 19th May, 2026 :Vawiin chawhma khan Sialkal Range Development Council (SRDC) Meeting chu an Chairman Pu F. Rodingliana, MLA Lengteng leh Minister of State ni bawk pisaah neih a ni a, he meeting-ah hian Council member-te pawh an tel a ni.

He Council Meeting hi Pu F. Rodingliana’n kaihruaiin Kum 2026-27 chhunga Sialkal Range hnuaia khaw paruk - Mimbung, Hrianghmun, Kawlbem, Teikhang, Selam leh Vaikhawtlang khuaa hmaasawnna hnathawh tur hrang hrangte leh SRDC area tih hmasawnna tur hrang hrangte sawiho a ni.

Chairman Pu F. Rodingliana chuan Sialkal Range Development Council-in a huam chin tih zauh tuma hmalak mek a nih thu tarlangin tuna khaw ruk bakah hian a chhehvel khua engemaw zat SRDC hnuaiah hian rin luh tum a nih thu tarlangin chhak tlangdung-a Burma ramri hnaiha awm khua te tih hmasawn kawngah Mizoram Sorkar-in nasa takin ngaihtuahna a seng mek a, chumi tur chuan SRDC area zauh mai bakah dan mumal tak hnuaia inrelbawlna a awm theihna turin sorkar-in SRDC manual leh inkaihhruaina dan te a ennawn mek a, heng hi tih puitlin a nih hunah chuan SRDC area a huam chin khua ten nasa takin hma an sawn ngei a beisei thu a sawi a ni. Tin, Chairman hian kumthar lamah chuan SRDC Budget pawh tihpun a nih a beisei thu a tarlang bawk a ni.

He SRDC Council meeting-ah hian Chairman Pu F. Rodingliana, MLA Lengteng bakah member dang Pu H. Ginzalala, MLA Champhai North, SDO Civil, Ngopa, Development Officer, SRDC leh Mimbung, Hrianghmun, Kawlbem, Teikhang, Selam leh Vaikhawtlang VCP theuhte an tel a ni.

title: Nute Ni Pualin Hnahthial District chhunga Nu Chhuanawmte hnenah Chawimawina hlan
content:
588/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial, the 19th May, 2026: Mission Shakti hnuaiah District Hub for Empowerment of Women (DHEW) bultumin vawiin khan DC Meeting Hall-ah fate chawm seilen kawnga nu chhuanawm pahnih - Pi Biakchhungi leh Pi Vanlalliani te chu Hnahthial Bawrhsap, Pi K. Vanlalruati chuan chawimawina thuziak (citation) leh pawisa fai a hlan a. Bawrhsap chuan chawimawina dawngtute bakah Nute ni puala hetiang buatsaih nachang hria, Women & Child Development-te chu fakawm a tih thu a sawi.

Bawrhsap chuan Nu fel leh chhuanawm tak pahnih hnenah chawimawina a hlan thei chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, Pa tel lova fa puitling tak tak an enkawl seilian chu fakawm a tih thu a sawi a. Pi Biakchhungi leh Pi Vanlalliani te chuan an fate chu chawm seilian satliah mai lova mahni inchawm thei, mi puilting tak veka an chhuah chu ropui a tih thu sawiin a dawng tur tak ten chawimawina an dawng ni a a hriat thu a sawi. Hei bakah hian he hun buatsaihtu, Women & Child Development lama thawktute chu fakawm a tih thu sawiin thil tihchhunzawm zel tlak tak ni a a hriat thu a sawi bawk.

Chawimawina dawngtu, Pi Biakchhungi w/o Hrangliana (L) hi Pangzawl Khawngbawk venga mi niin fa sawm leh pakhat (11) a nei a. A fate pahnih hi boral tawhin a pasalin an boral san hnu hian amahin fa pakua (9) hi a rem rem thawk chungin a chawm puitling vek a. A fate hi tunah chuan a then sawrkar hnaah te lutin a thenin dawrte an siam a, anmahniin an intodelh vek tawh a ni.

Chawimawina dawngtu Pi Vanlalliani w/o Biakhmingliana (L) hi Tarpho khua a cheng niin a pasalin a boral san hnu hian a theih theih a inhlawhin a fa panga (5) te chu a chawm seilian a. Tunah chuan a fa upa ber hian High School zirtirtu hna thawk mekin thenkhatin Missionary hna an thawk a, an naupang ber hian computer a zir mek bawk a ni.

Chawimawina hian thuziak (Citation) bakah pawisa fai cheng sang nga (Rs. 5000) a keng tel a ni.

Programme hi Pi F. Lalnuntluangi, Child Development Project Officer (CDPO) kaihhruaina hnuaiah DHEW thawktute nen hman a ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP - HOVIN  PI GOSPEL VANLALPANI VANDIR (MIS) LAWMPUINA NEI
content:
587/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 19th May 2026 :Vawiin khan Lawngtlai Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga hovin  Mizoram Civil Services ( Combined Competitive Examination) 2025 - a Mizoram Inforamtion Service (MIS) a inziak tling Pi Gospel Vanlalpani Vandir lawmpuina a Office Chamber-ah neih a ni. He hunah hian Pi Gospel Vanlalpani Vandir Nu leh Pa, DC Office - a thawk te leh  Mizoram Journalist Association (MJA)Lawngtlai te an  tel thei  a ni.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan thinglung taka Pi Gospel Vanlalpani Vandir a lawmpui thu a sawi a. Hna tha leh zahawm tak thawk turin theihtawp chhuaha beih a ngai thin tih sawiin, a thawhrimna leh inpekna zara hlawhtlinna a chang chu a chhuanawm hle a ni, a ti. Tunah chuan sawrkar mi a nih tawh angin, a thiamna, finna leh thawhrimna chu ram leh mipuite tana hmanga, theihtawp chhuah tura fuihin a kal zelna turah duhsakna a hlan nghal a ni.

Bawrhsap chuan Zirlaite tan hlawhtling turin theihtawp chhuah a ngai thin a, hlawhtlinna lo chang tawhte hmem atanga thutawn lakpeih pawh thi tul tak a ni, tiin, entawn tlâk te entawn thiam fo turin a chah a. A bik takin Lawngtlai District atanga mithiam zawk an lo chhuah a, hna tha tak tak an thawh theihna turin District Administration chuan theihtawp a chhuah zel tur thu tarlangin, zirlaite pawh hlawhtlinna chang ngei tura an zirlai hei turin a chah nghal bawk.

Pi Margaret J . Vanlalremmawii SDO (S) chuan DC Office aiawhin  Pi Gospel Vanlalpani Vandir hnenah hian lawmpuina ' Memento ' a hlan a ni.

He hunah hian Pu Lalthangmawia Vandir F/o Pi Gospel Vanlalpani Vandir chuan lawmthu sawina a neiin, rinawm taka kum 30 chuang a lo thawhtawhna department - a lo zawm ve leh chu ropui a tih thu a sawi a. Bawrhsap leh a thawhpuiten a fanu lawmpuina an  buatsaih sak chu ropui a tih thu tarlangin, hmalam hunah bawrhsap leh a thawhpuite duhsakna a hlan nghal bawk a ni. Pu Lalngheta Ralte, Treasurer, MJA, Lawngtlai chuan thutawi sawiin,  Pi Gospel Vanlalpani Vandir lawmpuina MJA hminga an neih tawh thu a tarlang a. Ram leh mipuite tan rawngbawlna  kawngah theihtawp chhuah tura fuihin, MJA - te nen pawha thawhhona tha tak an neih zel a beisei thu a sawi bawk.

Attachment

title: KAWLKULHAH PLASTIC WASTE MANAGEMENT UNIT HAWN A NI
content:
586/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 19th May, 2026:Nimin khan Plastic Waste Management Unit (PWMU) Kawlkulha sak chu Pu C Rosangliana, Chairman, WATSAN Committee chuang a hawng a, VC, NGO leh PHED staff engemaw zat an tel a ni.

PWMU hawnna inkhawm hi Khawzawl Sub Divisional Officer, PHED Pu Freddy Vanlalmuanawma chuan kaihruaiin, Pu TBC Lalthangzawna chuan technical report a pe a. PWMU hi Khawzawl block tana ruahman niin SBM (G) 2.0 fund hmanga thawh a ni a, Kawlkulh khua hi in 850 bawr vel niin, Kawlkulh khua bakah a chhehvela khaw hrang hrangten an hman ṭangkai theih tura ruahman niin, WATSAN enkawl chhunzawm tur a ni a, tunah hian user charge in tinah khawn ṭan nghal a nih thu a sawi a. Plastic incinerator leh segregation shed dah niin user fee collection aṭang hian bailing machine leh shredding machine te pawh leichhoh zel tura ruahman a ni, a ti.

He hunah hian bialtu Pu Liantluanga Chohte, Sr. Executive Engineer, PHED Khawzawl chuan Plastic sawngbawlna khawl te hi mipui ten tangkai taka hmang tur leh duat taka enkawl turin a chah a,  sawrkar chauh rinchhan lova, ti hlawhtling tura mipui ten ngaihtuahna bakah kan hun leh tha te kan senral ve angaih thu a sawi a, Khawzawl District khua ten plastic hnawmhnawkte mumal leh him zawka kan senghawi theih nan Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026 dung zui zela kan thawh a pawimawh thu kalkhawmte hmaah a sawi a ni.

Attachment

title: DAWMDAWI DAWR KHAR DAWN AVANGA CHIAI LO TURIN MIPUITE CHAH
content:
585/2026-2027

Aizawl, 19th May, 2026 :F.Lalliantluanga, Controlling & Licensing Authority, Directorate of Health Services a hnuaia tarlan ang hian thuchhuah a siam :

All India Organisation of Chemists & Druggists (AIOCD) chuan May 20, 2026 hian rampum huapin Online pharmacy dodal nan leh India rama e-pharmacy pawm a nih loh nan damdawi dawr zawng zawng kharin bandh a huaihawt dawn a. Mizorama damdawi zuarte pawhin he bandh hi zawm ve an tum a ni.

Mizoram FDA chuan mipuite chiai lo turin a chah a. Sawrkar leh Private hospital pharmacy-te hawn a nih dawn avangin hengahte hian mamawh a lam theih reng dawn a ni. Damdawi dawr khar avanga buaina awm thei pumpelh nan hengte hi hriat ni se:

1. Natna benvawn zunthlum, thisen sang, asthma, cancer, etc. nei chuan bandh hma ngeiin mahni damdawi mamawh lo inlam lawk ni se.

2. Emergency-a mamawh theih insulin, inhalers, life-saving drugs leh naupang damdawi mamawh lo ngaihtuah lawk ni bawk se.

3. Nikhat chauh bandh a nih dawn avangin mamawh tawk bak a chuang aliamin eng damdawi mah lei khawl loh ni se.4. Accident leh rikrum thil dang thleng a awmin, hospital hnai ber biak pawh thuai ni se.5. Damdawi zuarte pawh dawr kharin bandh zawm mah se, emergency thila damdawi mamawh a awmin dawr hawnsak hram hram tura ngen leh beisei an ni.

6. Bandh zawm avangin damlo nen emaw, FDA official-te nen emaw inep zawnga kal loh hram hram ni se.

7. FDA Officer-ten an bial enkawl chhungah bandh avanga damdawi mamawh hmuh zawh loh a awm loh nan hma an la vek tur a ni bawk ang.

title: LAWNGTLAI KHAWPUI CHHUNGA LIRTHEI DAN BAWHCHHIA AN TLEM LEH MIPUITE HIM ZAWK NAN A LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP THUCHHUAH
content:
584/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 18th May 2026 :Lawngtlai khawpui chhunga lirthei Dan bawhchhia an lo tlem zawk nan leh mipuite him zawk nan a hnuaia mi ang hian Lawngtlai Bawrhsap chuan thuchhuah a siam.

ORDER

No.J.11013/2/2026- DC (LTI): Stand Up Lawngtlai (Tho Law Dir Tuah) meeting Dt. 08.05.2026 in a rel angin, Lawngtlai khawpui chhunga Lirthei Dan bawhchhia an lo tlem zawk nan leh mipuite kan lo hum tlan zawk nan khapna thupek chhuah tula hriat a ni.

Chuvangin kei, DONNY LALRUATSANGA , MCS, DISTRICT MAGISTRATE, LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT, LAWNGTLAI chuan Section 163 of Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita (BNSS), 2023-thuneihna min pek angin a hnuaia thupek hi ka chhuah e.

1. Mi tumahin Lirthei mihring tana hlauhawm khawpin an khalh tur a ni lo.

2. Dan in a phal chin pel a chak in lirthei an khalh tur a ni lo.

3. Kawngpui leh mipui punkhawmna hmun-ah traffic tibuai zawngin lirthei an dah tur a ni lo.

4. Driving Licence leh documents pawimawh nei lovin lirthei an khalh tur a ni lo.

5. Rui chungin lirthei an khalh tur a ni lo.

6. Lirthei khalh laiin mobile phone an hmang tur a ni lo.

7. Helmet khum lo leh seat belt hreng lovin lirthei an khalh tur a ni lo.

8. Dan bawhchhia a zirin hremna pawisa (penalty) The Motor Vehicles (Amendment) Act, 2019 hmangin Rs. 500 atang Rs. 10,000 thleng chawi tir theih a ni.

He thupek zawm lo te chu Section, 223 of Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita (BNS) hmangin hrem theih an ni ang.

He thupek hian Lawngtlai District pum a huam anga, thu leh awm hma chu tihchhuah anih atanga thlahnih(2) chhung a huam ang.

He thupek hi vawiin Dt. 15.05.2026 hian District Magistrate Seal- a nemnghetin hming ka ziah hnan e.

Sd/-DONNY LALRUATSANGADistrict MagistrateLawngtlai District, Lawngtlai.

Attachment
